memberdef.argsstring: (self, int min_port=DEFAULT_MIN_PORT, int max_port=DEFAULT_MAX_PORT, int default_lifetime=DEFAULT_ALLOCATION_LIFETIME, int max_allocations=DEFAULT_MAX_ALLOCATIONS)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Initialize allocation manager.
Args: min_port: Minimum relay port max_port: Maximum relay port default_lifetime: Default allocation lifetime in seconds max_allocations: Maximum concurrent allocations
Start allocation manager and cleanup task.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tuple[str, int] client_addr, Tuple[str, int] relay_addr, str transport="udp", Optional[int] lifetime=None)
memberdef.name: create_allocation

para.verbatim:
Create a new allocation.
Args: client_addr: Client's (ip, port) relay_addr: Relay server's (ip, port) transport: Transport protocol lifetime: Requested lifetime (uses default if None)
Returns: TurnAllocation or None if max allocations reached

Get allocation by ID.
Args: allocation_id: Allocation ID
Returns: TurnAllocation or None

Get allocation by client address.
Args: client_addr: Client's (ip, port)
Returns: TurnAllocation or None

Get allocation by relay address.
Args: relay_addr: Relay's (ip, port)
Returns: TurnAllocation or None

Refresh an allocation's lifetime.
Args: allocation_id: Allocation ID lifetime: New lifetime (uses default if None)
Returns: Updated TurnAllocation or None

Delete an allocation.
Args: allocation_id: Allocation ID
Returns: True if allocation was deleted

Add permission for a peer.
Args: allocation_id: Allocation ID peer_addr: Peer's (ip, port)
Returns: True if permission was added

Remove all expired allocations.
Returns: Number of allocations removed

Get allocation manager statistics.
Returns: Statistics dictionary

Manages TURN allocations.
Handles allocation creation, refresh, permission management, and cleanup.
